---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}


##  ``Sprint#13: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VI`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **13**  | 43 | 09/03/2026 | - Sprint#13: ApartmentPredictor React Full-Architecture VI </br></br>  - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`:**v2** and **v3** </br> (2) Folder structure </br> (3) Apartment CRUD </br> (4) Sidebar (`Drawer`) and Theming (`sx`)   </br></br>  - <s>MathsWeb: sidebar and theming </s></br></br> - Commit `26444`: Where is the error? </br> - Commit `e24f4f`: CREATE error</br></br> - **AWS**: `S3` bucket & `Dynamodb` NoSql | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: 26444](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/264447272b44887ae866092e4b03d357a093ce30){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [CREATE CRUD error](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/commit/e24f4ff23009d8d924548f69c687dd03c4a0f7e5){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Project Structure v2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/refs/heads/master/docs/screenshots/PROJECT_apartmentPredictorReact-v2-3.png){.external target='_blank'}</br>  ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/refs/heads/master/docs/diagrams/TREE-ApartmentPredictor_v3.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br>- [React Project Structure & dev tools](https://albertprofe.dev/reactjs/reactjs-what-create.html){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [React dev tools](https://react.dev/learn/react-developer-tools){.external target='_blank'} / - [Chrome store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/react-developer-tools/fmkadmapgofadopljbjfkapdkoienihi?pli=1){.external target='_blank'}</br></br>   - [mathsWeb: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mathsWeb){.external target='_blank'} / - [mathsWeb: deployed](https://mathswebspace.netlify.app/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  </br> - [`.gsheet`: where is the error](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kfoAkUGmKkh_zEjirbhCQr7pHbilVEgBcC9BmzhsRQw/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} /  - [Java jar v3 backend download](https://albertprofedocs.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/java_jar/apartment-predictor_v3.jar){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/TREE-ApartmentPage-v2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  |
|   | 44 | 10/03/2026 |  - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`: **v2** and **v3** </br> (2) Folder structure </br> (3) Apartment CRUD </br> (4) Sidebar (`Drawer`) and Theming (`sx`)  </br> </br>- Commit `8523d90`: CREATE & UPDATE error</br></br>   - MathsWeb: sidebar and theming </br> - userBorrowBookFront | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: 80227d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/80227dc686cd4ae00dda45bda9aa0e3bfc048897){.external target='_blank'} </br></br>   - [mathsWeb: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mathsWeb){.external target='_blank'} / - [mathsWeb: deployed](https://mathswebspace.netlify.app/){.external target='_blank'} / - [userBorrowBookFront](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/userBorrowBookFront/tree/master){.external target='_blank'} </br>  </br> - [`.gsheet`: where is the error](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kfoAkUGmKkh_zEjirbhCQr7pHbilVEgBcC9BmzhsRQw/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} /  - [Java jar v3 backend download](https://albertprofedocs.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/java_jar/apartment-predictor_v3.jar){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br>- [ApartmentPredictor-React: afeb8caf](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/afeb8cafa5ff19a965205715d54cb2781dee22d2){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/TREE-apartmentPage-v2-2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/TREE-apartmentPage-v2-3.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  |
|   |    | | |
|   | 45 | 12/03/2026 |  - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`: **v4** </br> (2) Folder structure </br> (3) Apartment CRUD </br> (4) Sidebar (`Drawer`) and Theming (`sx`)   </br></br>  | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: xxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/){.external target='_blank'}
|   | 46 | 13/03/2026 | - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`: **v4** </br> (2) Folder structure </br> (3) Apartment CRUD </br> (4) Sidebar (`Drawer`) and Theming (`sx`)   </br></br> | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: xxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/){.external target='_blank'}
: Backlog Sprint#13 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
